headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -104.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 105% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 112 quotes, including 98 at strong intensity - people are expressing very heated complaints today.

• This frustration level sits in the upper tier of the 82-day range, though still below the peak of 163.

• Frustrations climbed further from yesterday's already elevated 90, while fears and optimism remained relatively muted.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
